seedanceSegments.title: Glossy jammy egg hook
seedanceSegments.description: Food-porn cold open: red garlic boil sauce, jammy yolk smear, six-egg hero bowl, and a quick satisfied Licorn context beat.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context, not as camera framing. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as the active shot-specific kitchen view. Use @Spoon only as sauce-basting and yolk-press utensil. Use @CharacterSheet only as character identity. Use @PoseThreeQuarterRight only as three-quarter bowl-hold posture. Use @CharacterExpressions only as satisfied expression guidance. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, sexy glossy food-porn energy where appropriate, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only close synchronized kitchen ASMR sounds. Kitchen continuity lock: same Licorn kitchen layout and materials, light terrazzo countertop, consistent cabinets, no redesigned stovetop. Scale lock: six standard chicken eggs, palm-sized, not quail eggs, not oversized, not miniature. Food-state lock: thick orange jammy yolk, not raw watery yolk, not dry gray yolk. Global negatives: no text, no captions, no speech, no voiceover, no music, no extra shots.
